content.en:
Terran, the realm of the endless seams.

Ye Tian's copy body has returned.

His other copy bodies had sensed that the Demon Seed Abyss Will Incarnation had descended to the Divine Realm.

"It's troublesome, the incarnation of the will of the Demon Seed Abyss can really leave the Demon Seed Abyss, although it may not be able to last long, but if it is crazy killing, it will not be long before it can kill countless living beings!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Now, he could only let those Terrans come back from the Eternal Realm or the Realm God Realm as soon as possible, and then close the Endless Realm Rift Realm and open the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array.

In this way, it will be able to resist the attack of the incarnation of the abyss will of the demon seed.

As long as you hold on until the will incarnation of the demon seed abyss dissipates, it will be victory.

Soon.

A large number of human races have returned from the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm, but the speed of cultivation is very slow, and whether they can avoid the crisis depends on luck.

......

The realm of the gods.

The incarnation of the Demon Seed Abyss Will made a crazy move, and with a wave of his hand, a large number of eternal realms collapsed, countless living beings fell, and even high-level peak realm gods were just ants.

I saw that the headquarters of a top force was shattered by the incarnation of the Demon Seed Abyss Will with a wave of his hand, and 05 Those high-level realm gods had no hope of escaping.

Whew!!!

The speed of the incarnation of the demon seed abyss will was too fast, and he quickly caught up with a peak realm god, and pinched the other party to death with one hand.

It didn't take long for all parts of the Realm God Realm to be shattered.

At this time, the incarnation of the demon seed abyss will became even weaker.

So, he stopped killing those weak creatures, and set his sights on the headquarters of those supreme forces.

Supreme force, Taihao Heavenly Palace.

The pinnacle realm gods here were also terrified, and they also knew that the demon seed abyssal will was killing wildly, and they were worried that they would be targeted.

"With so many supreme forces, our Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace may not be targeted!"

A pinnacle realm god whispered.

Whatever is terrible will come.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying black giant hand grabbed from the void, and at the critical moment, the Thousand Days Eternal Array of the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace was urged.

The golden light turned into an eternal curtain of light, blocking the giant black hand.

But the pinnacle realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace were very frightened, because this big black hand was the incarnation of the will of the demon seed abyss!

The second blow is coming, and the attack is even more terrifying.

Click!

The Thousand Days Eternal Array is about to shatter.

"No!"

These pinnacle realm gods were desperate.

With only the second blow, the Thousand Days Eternal Array can't be stopped, how can this resist the incarnation of the Demon Seed Abyss Will!

Soon, the third blow came.

Rumble!!!!

The Thousand Days Eternal Array was completely shattered.

Immediately after, the void cracked, and the incarnation of the abyssal will of the demon seed descended.

"Run!"

They tried to flee into the Void of Death, so that there might be hope of survival.

However, only a few peak realm gods escaped from the passage into the Death Void in time, and the other peak realm gods, high-level realm gods, and countless living beings did not have time to escape, and were obliterated by the power of the incarnation of the abyss will of the demon seed.

The endless creatures collapsed and turned into corpses.

The Demon Seed Abyss Will Incarnation did not chase into the Void of Death to hunt down other peak realm gods, but attacked other supreme forces again.

This moment.

All the supreme forces are terrified, lest they be targeted.

Two Realms Gate.

The god of the Liangyi Realm also frowned, he didn't expect the plan to fail this time, he never expected the Demon Seed Abyss Will incarnation to be so terrifying.

"I underestimated those peak demon seeds, and even let all the demon seeds sacrifice!"

The gods of the Liangyi Realm secretly said.

Of course, the Demon Seed Abyss Will Incarnation wouldn't last long, as long as he dodged it, it would be fine. []

Immediately afterward, he became distressed.

According to the plan, he asked the Blood Shadow Puppet to kill all those peak demon seeds, seize all the resources, and give the other five Supreme Realm Gods some resources, most of which still belonged to him.

Then, he bought a few more places to follow the ship, and let several peak realm gods of the Two Realms Gate leave here together.

Unfortunately, the plan failed, and he didn't have time to gather resources.

After the incarnation of the demon seed abyss will dissipates, I am afraid it will be too late to collect resources.

When the time comes, other peak realm gods will definitely collect it, and he doesn't have the help of the blood shadow puppet, so he doesn't have much advantage.

As time slowly passed, in the end, two more supreme forces were breached and the headquarters was breached, and only a small number of peak realm gods fled.

The fourth supreme force was smart, as soon as the Demon Seed Abyss Will incarnation attacked, they immediately fled into the Death Void and directly abandoned the other realm gods.

However, this also allowed them to retain the peak realm god combat power, and they would still be able to restore the strength of the supreme force in the future.

......

Ye Tian has been opening the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, and the six replica bodies are urging this Super Dimensional Formation with all their might, and they have also sacrificed a large number of Super Dimensional Secret Treasures, such as the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield, although it is not very useful, it is good to be able to resist it a little.

However, his luck was good, the Demon Seed Abyss Will did not invade the Endless Rift Realm of the Human Race.

After all, the Endless Seam Realm is the headquarters of the new Supreme Force, and the Demon Seed Abyss Will Incarnation will naturally invade some old Supreme Forces as soon as possible, so that they will not come to deal with him!

And when the Demon Seed Abyss Will Incarnation attacked the Fifth Supreme Force, its power was exhausted and the incarnation dissipated.

At this time, the other supreme forces knew about the situation. 073

It's just that they didn't dare to go to the Demon Seed Abyss in the first place.

They were afraid that the Demon Seed Abyss Will would be able to condense an incarnation again, in that case, they would be dead.

But Ye Tian was not afraid, he immediately sent a copy body to the abyss of the demon seed.

Demon Seed Abyss.

Ye Tian came here, and he didn't encounter any demon seeds, after all, almost all the demon seeds were sacrificed, even if there were some fish that slipped through the net and ordinary demon seeds who didn't have much wisdom, they also posed an unfavorable threat to him.

At this time.

He felt a will locking onto him, it should be the will of the Demon Seed Abyss.

It's a pity that the other party has no longer condensed the incarnation, and can only suppress his strength, and can't deal with him in person.

Wow!!!!!

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and soon came to the place where he had fought, and found the fragments of those peak demon seeds and the remaining treasures.

"Close!"

Ye Tian put away the treasures one by one, and then looked for the lair of the peak demon seed, he wanted to find as many resources as he could before the arrival of other peak realm gods.

Time passed, and the other peak realm gods finally couldn't bear it anymore and went to the demon seed abyss one after another.

"It's almost, it's time to leave!"

Ye Tian quickly left and returned to the realm of the Endless Rift.
